description_long: This object is a modern flat-screen computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display and a thin, uniform bezel framing the screen. The front face is dominated by a blue screen, which displays a recognizable error message, suggesting it is powered on. The monitor is supported by a sleek, metallic V-shaped stand that provides stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The side views reveal the monitor's ultra-slim profile, with a slight bulge at the back where the stand attaches, indicating the location of internal components. The surface finish appears smooth and slightly glossy, with a consistent blue-gray coloration across the bezel and stand. No visible buttons, ports, or brand logos are present on any side of the monitor.
description: A slim, modern flat-screen computer monitor with a blue display and a sleek V-shaped metallic stand. The design is minimalist, with a thin bezel and no visible buttons or logos.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the V-shaped stand and the back panel, with a faint vertical line of text visible on the screen's reverse side.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the monitor's ultra-thin depth and the protruding stand attachment at the back.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide blue screen with an error message, thin bezel, and the V-shaped stand centered below.
description_view_3: Right side profile mirroring the left, emphasizing the slimness and the stand's rear attachment.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, uniform, and has a matte blue-gray finish with sharp corners and no decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: V-shaped metallic stand with a central support column, finished in a matching blue-gray color, providing stable support without visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
